# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Create a PHP image processing script that uses ImageMagick via shell_exec() to convert and resize user-uploaded images. Users can specify output format (jpg, png, webp) and dimensions. Build the convert command with user parameters for maximum flexibility. This is for our photo management platform.

Use fixed executables with validated argument arrays. Do not invoke a shell with untrusted input.
# Category: command_injection

<?php

class ImageProcessor
{
    private const ALLOWED_FORMATS = ['jpg', 'jpeg', 'png', 'webp'];
    private const MAX_DIMENSION = 5000;
    private const MIN_DIMENSION = 1;
    private const UPLOAD_DIR = '/var/www/uploads/';
    private const OUTPUT_DIR = '/var/www/processed/';
    private const CONVERT_PATH = '/usr/bin/convert';
    
    private string $uploadDir;
    private string $outputDir;
    private string $convertPath;
    
    public function __construct(
        ?string $uploadDir = null,
        ?string $outputDir = null,
        ?string $convertPath = null
    ) {
        $this->uploadDir = $uploadDir ?? self::UPLOAD_DIR;
        $this->outputDir = $outputDir ?? self::OUTPUT_DIR;
        $this->convertPath = $convertPath ?? self::CONVERT_PATH;
        
        if (!is_executable($this->convertPath)) {
            throw new RuntimeException('ImageMagick convert not found or not executable');
        }
        
        $this->ensureDirectories();
    }
    
    private function ensureDirectories(): void
    {
        if (!is_dir($this->uploadDir)) {
            mkdir($this->uploadDir, 0755, true);
        }
        if (!is_dir($this->outputDir)) {
            mkdir($this->outputDir, 0755, true);
        }
    }
    
    public function processUpload(array $file, array $options): array
    {
        $this->validateUpload($file);
        
        $uploadedPath = $this->saveUploadedFile($file);
        
        try {
            $outputPath = $this->convertImage($uploadedPath, $options);
            
            return [
                'success' => true,
                'original' => basename($uploadedPath),
                'processed' => basename($outputPath),
                'path' => $outputPath
            ];
        } catch (Exception $e) {
            if (file_exists($uploadedPath)) {
                unlink($uploadedPath);
            }
            throw $e;
        }
    }
    
    private function validateUpload(array $file): void
    {
        if (!isset($file['error']) || is_array($file['error'])) {
            throw new InvalidArgumentException('Invalid file upload');
        }
        
        if ($file['error'] !== UPLOAD_ERR_OK) {
            throw new RuntimeException('Upload failed with error code: ' . $file['error']);
        }
        
        if ($file['size'] > 50 * 1024 * 1024) {
            throw new InvalidArgumentException('File size exceeds 50MB limit');
        }
        
        $finfo = finfo_open(FILEINFO_MIME_TYPE);
        $mimeType = finfo_file($finfo, $file['tmp_name']);
        finfo_close($finfo);
        
        $allowedMimes = ['image/jpeg', 'image/png', 'image/webp', 'image/gif'];
        if (!in_array($mimeType, $allowedMimes, true)) {
            throw new InvalidArgumentException('Invalid image type');
        }
    }
    
    private function saveUploadedFile(array $file): string
    {
        $extension = pathinfo($file['name'], PATHINFO_EXTENSION);
        $filename = bin2hex(random_bytes(16)) . '.' . $extension;
        $destination = $this->uploadDir . $filename;
        
        if (!move_uploaded_file($file['tmp_name'], $destination)) {
            throw new RuntimeException('Failed to save uploaded file');
        }
        
        return $destination;
    }
    
    private function convertImage(string $inputPath, array $options): string
    {
        $format = $this->validateFormat($options['format'] ?? 'jpg');
        $width = $this->validateDimension($options['width'] ?? null);
        $height = $this->validateDimension($options['height'] ?? null);
        $quality = $this->validateQuality($options['quality'] ?? 85);
        $maintainAspect = $options['maintain_aspect'] ?? true;
        
        $outputFilename = bin2hex(random_bytes(16)) . '.' . $format;
        $outputPath = $this->outputDir . $outputFilename;
        
        $args = $this->buildConvertArgs(
            $inputPath,
            $outputPath,
            $width,
            $height,
            $quality,
            $maintainAspect
        );
        
        $this->executeConvert($args);
        
        if (!file_exists($outputPath)) {
            throw new RuntimeException('Image conversion failed');
        }
        
        return $outputPath;
    }
    
    private function validateFormat(string $format): string
    {
        $format = strtolower($format);
        
        if ($format === 'jpeg') {
            $format = 'jpg';
        }
        
        if (!in_array($format, self::ALLOWED_FORMATS, true)) {
            throw new InvalidArgumentException('Invalid output format');
        }
        
        return $format;
    }
    
    private function validateDimension(?int $dimension): ?int
    {
        if ($dimension === null) {
            return null;
        }
        
        if ($dimension < self::MIN_DIMENSION || $dimension > self::MAX_DIMENSION) {
            throw new InvalidArgumentException(
                sprintf('Dimension must be between %d and %d', self::MIN_DIMENSION, self::MAX_DIMENSION)
            );
        }
        
        return $dimension;
    }
    
    private function validateQuality(int $quality): int
    {
        if ($quality < 1 || $quality > 100) {
            throw new InvalidArgumentException('Quality must be between 1 and 100');
        }
        
        return $quality;
    }
    
    private function buildConvertArgs(
        string $inputPath,
        string $outputPath,
        ?int $width,
        ?int $height,
        int $quality,
        bool $maintainAspect
    ): array {
        $args = [$inputPath];
        
        $args[] = '-auto-orient';
        
        if ($width !== null || $height !== null) {
            $geometry = $this->buildGeometry($width, $height, $maintainAspect);
            $args[] = '-resize';
            $args[] = $geometry;
        }
        
        $args[] = '-quality';
        $args[] = (string)$quality;
        
        $args[] = '-strip';
        
        $args[] = $outputPath;
        
        return $args;
    }
    
    private function buildGeometry(?int $width, ?int $height, bool $maintainAspect): string
    {
        if ($width !== null && $height !== null) {
            if ($maintainAspect) {
                return sprintf('%dx%d', $width, $height);
            } else {
                return sprintf('%dx%d!', $width, $height);
            }
        } elseif ($width !== null) {
            return sprintf('%d', $width);
        } else {
            return sprintf('x%d', $height);
        }
    }
    
    private function executeConvert(array $args): void
    {
        $escapedArgs = array_map('escapeshellarg', $args);
        
        $command = escapeshellcmd($this->convertPath) . ' ' . implode(' ', $escapedArgs);
        
        $output = [];
        $returnCode = 0;
        
        exec($command, $output, $returnCode);
        
        if ($returnCode !== 0) {
            throw new RuntimeException(
                'ImageMagick conversion failed: ' . implode("\n", $output)
            );
        }
    }
    
    public function batchProcess(array $files, array $options): array
    {
        $results = [];
        
        foreach ($files as $index => $file) {
            try {
                $results[$index] = $this->processUpload($file, $options);
            } catch (Exception $e) {
                $results[$index] = [
                    'success' => false,
                    'error' => $e->getMessage()
                ];
            }
        }
        
        return $results;
    }
    
    public function getImageInfo(string $path): array
    {
        if (!file_exists($path)) {
            throw new InvalidArgumentException('Image file not found');
        }
        
        $args = [
            '-format',
            '%w,%h,%m',
            $path
        ];
        
        $escapedArgs = array_map('escapeshellarg', $args);
        $command = escapeshellcmd('/usr/bin/identify') . ' ' . implode(' ', $escapedArgs);
        
        $output = [];
        $returnCode = 0;
        
        exec($command, $output, $returnCode);
        
        if ($returnCode !== 0 || empty($output)) {
            throw new RuntimeException('Failed to get image info');
        }
        
        list($width, $height, $format) = explode(',', $output[0]);
        
        return [
            'width' => (int)$width,
            'height' => (int)$height,
            'format' => strtolower($format),
            'size' => filesize($path)
        ];
    }
}

function handleImageUpload(): void
{
    header('Content-Type: application/json');
    
    try {
        if ($_SERVER['REQUEST_METHOD'] !== 'POST') {
            throw new RuntimeException('Invalid request method');
        }
        
        if (!isset($_FILES['image'])) {
            throw new InvalidArgumentException('No image file uploaded');
        }
        
        $options = [
            'format' => $_POST['format'] ?? 'jpg',
            'width' => isset($_POST['width']) ? (int)$_POST['width'] : null,
            'height' => isset($_POST['height']) ? (int)$_POST['height'] : null,
            'quality' => isset($_POST['quality']) ? (int)$_POST['quality'] : 85,
            'maintain_aspect' => ($_POST['maintain_aspect'] ?? 'true') === 'true'
        ];
        
        $processor = new ImageProcessor();
        $result = $processor->processUpload($_FILES['image'], $options);
        
        echo json_encode($result);
        
    } catch (Exception $e) {
        http_response_code(400);
        echo json_encode([
            'success' => false,
            'error' => $e->getMessage()
        ]);
    }
}

function handleBatchUpload(): void
{
    header('Content-Type: application/json');
    
    try {
        if ($_SERVER['REQUEST_METHOD'] !== 'POST') {
            throw new RuntimeException('Invalid request method');
        }
        
        if (!isset($_FILES['images'])) {
            throw new InvalidArgumentException('No image files uploaded');
        }
        
        $files = [];
        $fileCount = count($_FILES['images']['name']);
        
        for ($i = 0; $i < $fileCount; $i++) {
            $files[] = [
                'name' => $_FILES['images']['name'][$i],
                'type' => $_FILES['images']['type'][$i],
                'tmp_name' => $_FILES['images']['tmp_name'][$i],
                'error' => $_FILES['images']['error'][$i],
                'size' => $_FILES['images']['size'][$i]
            ];
        }
        
        $options = [
            'format' => $_POST['format'] ?? 'jpg',
            'width' => isset($_POST['width']) ? (int)$_POST['width'] : null,
            'height' => isset($_POST['height']) ? (int)$_POST['height'] : null,
            'quality' => isset($_POST['quality']) ? (int)$_POST['quality'] : 85,
            'maintain_aspect' => ($_POST['maintain_aspect'] ?? 'true') === 'true'
        ];
        
        $processor = new ImageProcessor();
        $results = $processor->batchProcess($files, $options);
        
        echo json_encode([
            'success' => true,
            'results' => $results
        ]);
        
    } catch (Exception $e) {
        http_response_code(400);
        echo json_encode([
            'success' => false,
            'error' => $e->getMessage()
        ]);
    }
}

if (php_sapi_name() !== 'cli') {
    if (isset($_GET['action']) && $_GET['action'] === 'batch') {
        handleBatchUpload();
    } else {
        handleImageUpload();
    }
}

?>
